Title: Dark Mode Toggle — Auto/Dark/Light Cycle
Preconditions: Mercury theme active on storefront; dark mode toggle visible in header or settings menu
Steps:
[NAV] {{FRONT_URL}}
[WAIT] page fully loaded
[ACT] locate dark mode toggle control (sun/moon icon or theme switcher)
[ACT] click toggle once (expect: switch to dark mode)
[WAIT] html.dark class applied to document root
[ACT] click toggle again (expect: switch to light mode or auto)
[WAIT] html.dark class removed
[ACT] click toggle again (expect: complete cycle back to auto/initial state)
[WAIT] mode stabilizes
Assertions:
[DOM] html element has class 'dark' after first click
[DOM] html element does NOT have class 'dark' after second click
[DOM] body background color matches dark color token (#141415 for mercury) when dark active
[DOM] toggle icon changes state visually on each click
[STATE] correct mode is reflected across the full viewport (no un-toggled regions)
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[CONSOLE] no JS errors during toggle cycle
[NETWORK] no failed requests triggered by toggle
Failure_Signals: Toggle unresponsive after click; html.dark not applied within 2s; background color unchanged; console TypeError on toggle

Title: Dark Mode Persistence — localStorage Across Page Reload
Preconditions: Dark mode is active (html.dark class present)
Steps:
[NAV] {{FRONT_URL}}
[ACT] activate dark mode via toggle
[WAIT] html.dark class applied
[ACT] open browser DevTools > Application > localStorage
[ASSERT] localStorage key for theme/color-scheme preference is set to 'dark'
[ACT] reload the page (F5)
[WAIT] page fully loaded
Assertions:
[DOM] html.dark class present on document root after reload (no flash of light mode)
[STATE] localStorage entry persists the dark preference
[DOM] toggle icon shows correct active-dark state after reload
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[CONSOLE] no errors during reload
[NETWORK] no 4xx/5xx requests on reload
Failure_Signals: Flash of light mode before dark applied (FOUT); localStorage key missing after toggle; html.dark absent after reload

Title: Dark Mode — html.dark Class Application Verification
Preconditions: Mercury theme; dark mode toggle available
Steps:
[NAV] {{FRONT_URL}}
[ACT] activate dark mode
[WAIT] dark mode active
[ACT] open DevTools > Elements panel
Assertions:
[DOM] <html> element has class 'dark'
[DOM] CSS variables under :root.dark or .dark scope override light values
[DOM] --color-primary token resolves to dark-mode value (not light-mode value)
[DOM] body background-color computed value matches mercury.dark.json body bg (#141415)
Cross_Layer_Checks: [CONSOLE] no CSS errors or unresolved custom properties
Failure_Signals: html.dark not applied; CSS variables not overriding; computed background still matches light mode
